A boss reward is valuable not only for i: A boss reward is valuable not only for its immediate stats but also for the route it helps unlock or the collection progress it starts. Open a boss entry to see its map and known drops, then follow the item link to compare the reward against your current equipment and permanent collection goals.
A complete set is valuable only when its: A complete set is valuable only when its pieces still fit the build
A drop chance describes an independent p: A drop chance describes an independent probability, not a guaranteed schedule. Receiving an item unusually early or late does not by itself prove that the published chance is wrong.
A game site with information players can: A game site with information players can actually use
A hidden arena reached from the: A hidden arena reached from the
A mobile roguelike RPG. You loop through: A mobile roguelike RPG. You loop through zones fighting monsters, collecting loot, and beating bosses to extend your run — chasing rarer gear and higher levels each time.
A monster's health and attack indicate w: A monster's health and attack indicate whether the fight is safe, but its experience, gold, region, and drops determine whether the encounter is worth an Adventure Point. Early in a run, experience can unlock important stat growth. Later, a specific equipment drop or reliable gold income may matter more than raw experience.
A run is a resource-management problem: A run is a resource-management problem
A site export and a TestFlight, App Stor: A site export and a TestFlight, App Store, or Google Play build may be published at different times. The store build installed on a device is the final authority for what the player experiences.
A tougher variant with stronger bosses a: A tougher variant with stronger bosses and higher death cost (6 AP), offering distinct Hard Mode drops. It's meant for well-geared runs.
About Tony Works — Independent Game Deve: About Tony Works — Independent Game Developer
Achievement stat bonuses are now derived: Achievement stat bonuses are now derived from the unlocked set (no inflation, syncs across devices).
Achievements now have a distinctive colo: Achievements now have a distinctive colored tab deck for All, Milestones, Combat, Collection, Normal, and Hard categories.
Achievements turn repeated runs into acc: Achievements turn repeated runs into account-wide progress. Enemy defeats, boss victories, regional exploration, and other milestones can grant permanent stat bonuses or unlock characters. They are not intended to replace the main run strategy; instead, they reward players for reaching meaningful goals while learning the game's systems.
Added an optional translucent arrow-cont: Added an optional translucent arrow-control pad for held movement, with a persistent on/off toggle in Settings.
Added edge-aware camera framing so entra: Added edge-aware camera framing so entrances at the top and bottom of each map stay visible above the Set controls and lower HUD.
Added full-edge safe-area padding for no: Added full-edge safe-area padding for notches and rounded phone corners, completed battle prompt translations, and standardized Store purchase-button heights.
adds a very small drop-rate bonus, cappe: adds a very small drop-rate bonus, capped at +0.6%. Drop-rate gear, set bonuses, and certain characters stack on top.
Adventure Point economy reconciled: 30 A: Adventure Point economy reconciled: 30 AP base · 4–6 AP on death · +3 AP per boss. Death now keeps your level, EXP, and gold.
Advertisements are not placed on legal,: Advertisements are not placed on legal, loading, error, navigation, search-only, or empty pages. Editorial content remains the focus of any monetized page.
Advertising and diagnostic identifiers p: Advertising and diagnostic identifiers processed by Google (AdMob, Firebase) and Apple are governed by their own controls: reset your advertising ID in device settings and decline the iOS App Tracking Transparency prompt. Purchase records held by the Apple App Store or Google Play are managed through those stores.
advertising identifiers such as Apple ID: advertising identifiers such as Apple IDFA or Google Advertising ID, ad interaction data, and consent choices through Google AdMob and Google User Messaging Platform. On iOS, tracking/personalized ads are used only if allowed through Apple's App Tracking Transparency prompt.
After an export, the site should be chec: After an export, the site should be checked for missing names, broken images, duplicate catalog records, invalid item links, bosses without usable map references, and maps that do not belong to a reachable route. HTML, JavaScript, sitemap URLs, canonical links, and important internal links are also validated before changes are published.
After the first boss victory, the game m: After the first boss victory, the game makes a one-time request for Apple’s native review prompt.

An achievement is most efficient when it: An achievement is most efficient when its requirement overlaps with what the current build already wants to do. A boss goal is easier to justify during a run prepared for that region, while a defeat-count milestone can progress naturally during equipment farming. Chasing an unrelated objective can consume Adventure Points without improving the current boss plan.

Automated exports are checked for incomp: Automated exports are checked for incomplete names, orphaned records, impossible routes, missing images, and values that no longer match the active game configuration. The detailed

Battle panel forced full-screen with a r: Battle panel forced full-screen with a run-over tap guard; live derived stats in the stat panel; equipment icon blur fix.
Because sets occupy multiple equipment s: Because sets occupy multiple equipment slots, they also change what can be upgraded later in the run. Before committing gold, identify which piece is hardest to replace and which piece contributes the least by itself.
Before changing worlds, check three thin: Before changing worlds, check three things: whether your current level is comfortable against nearby monsters, whether your equipment covers both damage and survival, and whether you still have enough Adventure Points to reach the intended boss. The best route adapts to the drops and character build of the current run.
Biome BGM name-matching fix; several doo: Biome BGM name-matching fix; several doorway/trigger retunes across Forest, Volcano, Desert and Underwater.
Boss victories open routes and can resto: Boss victories open routes and can restore momentum. Defeat ends the current run, but collected gear, unlocked equipment slots, achievements, and permanent collection bonuses make later attempts stronger. That combination of temporary growth and permanent preparation is the central loop.
Bosses give +3 AP, so clearing bosses is: Bosses give +3 AP, so clearing bosses is how you extend a run indefinitely. Farming trash costs net AP; boss kills pay you back.
Bosses sit at important progression poin: Bosses sit at important progression points. Reaching one with low health, an unfinished loadout, or too little damage can waste the Adventure Points invested in the route. Before entering, compare the boss's health and attack with the regular enemies you can defeat comfortably. If normal encounters already require many turns, the boss is likely to expose the same weakness more severely.
Build enough power without spending all: Build enough power without spending all your AP on unnecessary fights.

Catalog facts are exported from the same: Catalog facts are exported from the same Unity project used to build the game. Developer-written guides add context that raw numbers cannot provide. Exported facts and editorial explanations are kept visually separate so readers can tell the difference between a current game value and strategic advice.
Catalog values originate in the game pro: Catalog values originate in the game project
Character multipliers change how efficie: Character multipliers change how efficiently base stats become combat power. A strong attack multiplier rewards offensive equipment and shorter battles, while health or defense multipliers create a safer route through unfamiliar enemies. Agility and luck can support different strategies, but they should be judged alongside the character's complete profile rather than as isolated numbers.

Collected copies can also contribute per: Collected copies can also contribute permanent progress. The permanent amount is derived from the item's eligible base stats and copy milestone rather than granting the full equipped value forever. This makes a modest early item useful without allowing one common drop to overwhelm the entire economy. Open an item to see its copy table and distinguish equipped strength from banked collection strength.

confirmation first. If you cannot afford: confirmation first. If you cannot afford an item, character, or slot, its purchase button is disabled.
Corrected normal item drops to one share: Corrected normal item drops to one shared 3% roll per victory, and made recommended equipment stand out with a dedicated BEST badge.
Crit, dodge, and combo are reduced the f: Crit, dodge, and combo are reduced the further an enemy's level is above yours — so AGI/LUC that shred early zones taper off in deep worlds. Keep your level up to stay ahead.

Drop chances fall off sharply for items: Drop chances fall off sharply for items you already own copies of. Boost your odds with LUC (a very small bonus, capped at +0.6%), drop-rate gear/sets, and the drop-rate character. Boss uniques are ~1% (0.75% in Hard Mode) before bonuses.
Each enemy has a drop table with per-ite: Each enemy has a drop table with per-item chances (most are a few percent).
Each guide should help a player make a d: Each guide should help a player make a decision. Articles identify their subject, explain the relevant game system, link to supporting catalog data, and avoid promises that cannot be verified. Balance recommendations are described as strategy rather than absolute fact. Store availability and premium features are labeled clearly.
Each map has a boss guarding progression: Each map has a boss guarding progression. They hit harder and tank more than field monsters, but a boss kill refunds
Equipment first matters because of the s: Equipment first matters because of the stats and effects it provides during the current run. A weapon may raise attack enough to shorten battles, while armor and helmets can add the health or defense needed to survive a new region. Shoes and accessories may solve different problems, including agility, luck, economy, or utility effects.

Every detour should have a purpose. A lo: Every detour should have a purpose. A longer branch may be worthwhile when it offers a needed drop, safer experience, or a boss reward that strengthens future runs. The same branch becomes inefficient when regular encounters consume too much health or too many Adventure Points for the expected gain.
Every monster, boss, item, map and chara: Every monster, boss, item, map and character page is generated directly from the game's own data, so it stays accurate to the current build.

Game development changes quickly. A futu: Game development changes quickly. A future build can adjust balance, rewards, maps, or purchase availability. When a discrepancy is reported, the game source and current store build are checked before the site is corrected.

Grassland is the early hub. Forest and V: Grassland is the early hub. Forest and Volcanic extend to the west, Desert lies to the east, and the Underwater route begins through the northern docks. The World Gate is reached to the south as progression opens it. Void Hunt is a special route connected through Volcanic rather than a normal continuation from every region.
Hard Mode enemies are separate, stronger: Hard Mode enemies are separate, stronger versions intended for later progression. Their increased stats make damage races less forgiving, so equipment balance matters more. A build with excellent attack but weak survivability may clear normal enemies quickly and still fail when a Hard Mode enemy survives the opening turns.
Hard Mode is a second lap of the whole w: Hard Mode is a second lap of the whole world map. You effectively
Hard Mode values should be evaluated sep: Hard Mode values should be evaluated separately. A strategy that barely succeeds in Normal Mode is not a reliable Hard Mode plan. Build a safety margin, confirm that your strongest equipment occupies the correct slots, and avoid spending the last useful Adventure Points on optional farming immediately before the fight.
Hard Mode, grouped settings, and 11-lang: Hard Mode, grouped settings, and 11-language localization.
Holding near the character now fills the: Holding near the character now fills the Encounter Gauge, letting players seek a battle without leaving their current spot.

in-app purchases are processed by the Ap: in-app purchases are processed by the Apple App Store or Google Play. We receive purchase receipts or transaction information so purchases can be verified, restored, and protected from duplicate grants. We do not receive or store payment card details.

Infinite Loot-Loop contains connected ma: Infinite Loot-Loop contains connected maps, many enemies and equipment choices, permanent collection progress, achievements, and different character multipliers. Those systems are difficult to explain inside a small mobile interface without interrupting play. Tony Works therefore maintains this site as a separate, readable companion.
Infinite Loot-Loop mixes map exploration: Infinite Loot-Loop mixes map exploration with turn-based battles. Movement raises the encounter gauge, and an encounter consumes Adventure Points whether the battle is convenient or not. The challenge is therefore not simply to defeat everything. A strong run chooses fights that provide useful experience, gold, or equipment while preserving enough Adventure Points to reach the next boss.

Lean HP + ATK to clear fights, keep enou: Lean HP + ATK to clear fights, keep enough AGI/LUC that crit / combo / drops stay relevant, and add DEF to absorb boss spikes. Spread deliberately — there's no respec.
Learn movement and the encounter gauge,: Learn movement and the encounter gauge, equip every useful early drop, then reach the first boss with enough Adventure Points to complete the fight. Avoid grinding every enemy simply because it is nearby.
Learn the systems that matter, make smar: Learn the systems that matter, make smarter upgrades, and turn every defeat into a stronger next run.

Level ranges describe the enemy as it ap: Level ranges describe the enemy as it appears in its active zones. They are not a guarantee that two encounters will produce identical numbers. When a route begins taking too many turns per battle, compare the enemy's attack with your survival stats and consider returning with stronger gear rather than spending the rest of the run on inefficient fights.

Local save data remains on your device u: Local save data remains on your device until you delete it. Cloud save and entitlement records are kept while needed to provide save sync, purchase restore, support, and fraud prevention, and may be deleted on request where legally permitted. Diagnostic and advertising data are retained according to the third-party providers' own retention policies.

No single roster choice replaces equipme: No single roster choice replaces equipment, routing, and stat allocation. Use the character page to establish a build direction, then compare items that benefit from that direction. For the clearest comparison, look at the two strongest multipliers, the weakest multiplier, unlock requirements, and the owned bonus together.

This is particularly important for permanent bonuses, Hard Mode scaling, purchase values, drop chances, and newly connected maps because those systems can affect many pages at once.

Raw data can state that a monster has a: Raw data can state that a monster has a certain attack value or that an item belongs to a set. It cannot explain whether spending Adventure Points to farm that enemy is sensible for a particular run. Strategy sections are therefore written and reviewed as editorial guidance. They describe tradeoffs and link readers back to the current catalog.

Set bonuses reward collecting and equipp: Set bonuses reward collecting and equipping related pieces, but a set should not be completed automatically at the cost of every stronger standalone item. Compare the total equipped result: base stats, useful effects, character multipliers, and the set bonus together. One weak piece may still be worthwhile when the completed effect solves a major route problem; several weak pieces may not be.
Some characters provide an owned bonus t: Some characters provide an owned bonus that remains active after the character is obtained. These bonuses are displayed separately because they are not the same as the multipliers used while playing that character. Premium characters should be evaluated transparently: the roster identifies them as premium and shows the exact permanent utility they provide.
Some internal development records may al: Some internal development records may also be excluded when they are templates, duplicates, unused assets, or not reachable in the current game. The public bestiary, for example, is intended to represent enemies that can appear in active game zones rather than every test object that has ever existed in the project.
Spend gold where it solves a clear probl: Spend gold where it solves a clear problem. More attack can shorten the fight and reduce incoming damage, while health and defense provide room for unlucky exchanges. Equipment effects, character multipliers, and permanent bonuses can change which option has the greatest impact.
Spend it on gear, upgrades, and accessor: Spend it on gear, upgrades, and accessory-slot expansions.

The atlas offers both a spatial overview: The atlas offers both a spatial overview and a compact list. Open a world to follow its map sequence, branches, and bosses. Open an individual map when you need its art, dimensions, or the bosses associated with that location.
The catalog numbers are reference data,: The catalog numbers are reference data, not a promise that every future version will remain unchanged. Balance updates can alter health, attack, prices, drops, or routes. The
The catalog's comparison tool is best us: The catalog's comparison tool is best used with items from the same slot. A higher price or rarity does not automatically make an item better for every character, because character multipliers and current route threats change the value of each stat.
The companion wiki combines developer-wr: The companion wiki combines developer-written explanations with data exported from the Unity project. Players can learn how Adventure Points shape a run, compare character strengths, inspect item effects, trace connected maps, and prepare for bosses without relying on unexplained spreadsheets.
The export is intentionally limited to p: The export is intentionally limited to player-facing reference information. It does not publish player save data, purchase receipts, advertising identifiers, cloud credentials, private service keys, source code, or internal account records. Website analytics and game privacy practices are described separately in the
The Game and all related content, art, c: The Game and all related content, art, characters, and trademarks are owned by us or our licensors and are protected by law. These Terms do not grant you any ownership rights in the Game.
The Game is designed to work offline. Yo: The Game is designed to work offline. You can play normal gameplay, earn items, and save progress locally on your device without an internet connection. Some optional features require internet access, including cloud save sync, advertisements, crash reporting, and purchase verification or restore.
The Game is not directed to children und: The Game is not directed to children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided personal information, contact us and we will take appropriate action.
The Game may show advertisements provide: The Game may show advertisements provided by third parties, including optional rewarded ads. Purchasing "Remove Ads" disables standard banner and interstitial ads as described in the Game.

The game or website may abbreviate large: The game or website may abbreviate large values for readability. A shortened value such as 130K or 1M can hide smaller differences that still exist in the underlying number.
The game supports cloud save through its: The game supports cloud save through its supported platform identity and device setup. Cross-device restore depends on using the same supported platform account; Android's current sign-in setup may remain device-local until platform authentication is configured.
The Game uses the following services, ea: The Game uses the following services, each governed by its own privacy policy:
The game, companion tools, written guide: The game, companion tools, written guides, and exported reference data are maintained by Tony Works. Third-party articles are not copied into the wiki.
The goal is not to fill pages with searc: The goal is not to fill pages with search keywords. The goal is to answer practical player questions: where an item comes from, what a character bonus means, how a world connects to the next one, and why a route may consume too many Adventure Points.
The interactive catalogs read a structur: The interactive catalogs read a structured data file exported from the Unity project. It contains the fields needed by the public wiki, including enemy level and stat ranges, boss values and rewards, item types and effects, equipment-set membership, map relationships, character multipliers, achievements, and image references.
The mode tabs distinguish Normal, Hard,: The mode tabs distinguish Normal, Hard, and requirements that can be completed in either mode. Search by goal or reward when deciding which objective is close enough to pursue without abandoning a stronger route.
the more copies of an item you already o: the more copies of an item you already own, the sharply lower the chance of another — early copies come fast, then taper off hard.
The shortest route is not always the str: The shortest route is not always the strongest route
The Warrior is a balanced reference poin: The Warrior is a balanced reference point for learning the game. Other characters become more attractive when you understand which resource limits your progress. If a route fails because battles last too long, offense may be the answer. If a boss defeats you before your damage matters, durability deserves priority.
